metadata.purpose: Measured scan/non-scan recommendations for bundled fixed-boundary examples. These records drive the fast-first selector without inspecting input physics or size.

overrides.note: Focused profile: scan has higher cold XLA setup cost than non-scan, but warm runtime is much faster and is the production optimization/default throughput target.
Focused full-solve profile: disabling the profile and using scan gives warm vmec_jax runtime comparable to or faster than VMEC2000, while the profiled loop route is much slower.
